summary: Re-reviewed at HEAD e1fde0b after the judgment adjudicator's failure_mode:parse_failure unsound verdict. The fix genuinely closes the fail-open: corrupt judgment-adjudication.json now fails loud instead of silently returning null (needs_evidence masquerade), and corrupt pr-prepare.json raises an explicit parse-failure error instead of being misreported as missing; new regression test JADJ-S-011 is pre-fix-failing by construction. The reviewer independently re-ran the story suite (22/22 pass, JADJ-S-011 included) and typecheck (pass) at e1fde0b, and confirmed all four verification records are strict-head-bound to e1fde0b with clean worktree and a matching 40/40-pass artifact (focused-e1fde0b.json). Prior low findings (typecheck artifact=null, shared bundle artifact for subset commands) persist but remain honestly disclosed and independently re-verified. No fail-open path, stale binding, or misleading green at the new HEAD.

findings.detail: typecheck record has artifact=null; honestly disclosed and independently re-verified via node --check
unit/integration/e2e records share bundle artifact focused-e1fde0b.json while commands are subsets; subset re-run passed at same HEAD

inspection.summary: Inspected git show e1fde0b (src/adjudication.js and test/judgment-adjudication.test.js deltas), verification-evidence.json head/content bindings, qa artifacts focused-e1fde0b.json/.log; independently re-executed node --test on test/judgment-adjudication.test.js + test/e2e/story-vibepro-judgment-dag-adjudication-main.test.js (22/22 pass) and node --check on src/adjudication.js, src/pr-manager.js, src/cli.js at HEAD e1fde0badb87a80fee414d1bca50e4eaeb8e1f32 (clean worktree).
inputs: command: git show e1fde0b (parse-failure fix delta)
command: node --check src/adjudication.js src/pr-manager.js src/cli.js -> all pass

judgment_delta: Previous pass at a5203f9 did not surface the corrupt-artifact parse path — the fail-closed check covered stale/unbound head_commit binding but not malformed JSON, which the independent judgment adjudicator correctly caught as unsound. At e1fde0b that gap is fixed and regression-tested (JADJ-S-011 asserts the old misleading message is absent and the old silent-null path now rejects), evidence was fully re-recorded and re-bound to the new HEAD, and independent re-runs confirm the claims, so the verdict remains pass with the two carried-over low evidence-hygiene findings.
